name: PER_EMPL_CHILD_TXN_DATA
description: This table stores all the child transactions data.This is not a date effective table

columns.Name: EMPL_CHILD_TXN_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: This is a system generated primary key for this table

columns.Name: PARENT_TXN_ID
columns.Comments: This is parent transaction id for the child record to be inserted.

columns.Name: PARENT_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is parent object id for the child record to be inserted.

columns.Name: CHILD_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is child person id for the child record to be inserted.

columns.Name: CHILD_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is child object id for the child record to be inserted

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This indicates the status of the transaction.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This indicates any specific note for the child transaction record.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
